title: PSG beat Arsenal on penalties to retain Champions League title
subhed: Paris Saint-Germain and Arsenal went to a penalty shoot-out in Budapest on Saturday after a 1-1 draw, then PSG beat the Gunners with a final score of 4-3.

Teenager Moïse Kouamé’s French Open run ends in third round defeat
subhed: The 17-year-old lost in the French Open's third round to Alejandro Tabilo 4-6, 6-3, 6-4, 7-6 (9).

title: SoftBank to spend $87.5 billion on AI centers in France
subhed: The company's founder Masayoshi Son, 68, said he made the decision after meeting French President Emmanuel Macron during a visit to Tokyo in April and that France's status as an energy exporter had played a key role. Data centers are huge consumers of energy.

title: Paul McCartney blends rock and melancholic ballads in 'The Boys of Dungeon Lane,' his 20th solo album
subhed: The Beatles' co-founder invited the band's drummer, Ringo Starr, for a duet on the album. Starr, meanwhile, released his own record in April.

title: José Tolentino de Mendonça, the poet cardinal reconciling the Church and contemporary art
subhed: The Portuguese prelate has become a prominent figure in the world of contemporary art, befriending artists and film stars. As the driving force behind the Vatican Pavilion at the recently opened Venice Biennale, he has used his progressive outlook to help bridge the Church and a world that long viewed it with suspicion.

subhed: Among French President Emmanuel Macron's political heirs, and even on the left, some are starting to believe that the presidential campaign could play out in the middle, amid the collapse of France's former governing parties.

title: The Bolloré protégée spreading Russian propaganda in France
subhed: Xenia Fedorova, the former director of the now-banned Russian channel RT France, has free rein to advance the Kremlin's version of events without contradiction across the media empire of far-right billionaire Vincent Bolloré.

title: 'Reckless, racist, incompetent and treasonous': Bruce Springsteen delivers scathing indictment of Trump at Washington concert
subhed: During the final concert of his US tour, the 76-year-old artist accused the Republican president of 'destroying the American idea and our reputation around the world.'
